Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: Warm temperature 27–28°C and diurnal light/dark cycles are central treatments throughout the study.

Applied_Promoters.reason: 35S constructs, pPIF4:LUC, and pYUCCA8:LUC are explicitly used.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: All listed methods were used in Results for MED25-related claims.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: Both med25 loss-of-function and MED25 overexpression reduced warm-temperature hypocotyl elongation, supporting dosage sensitivity/complexity.
